description: An alert indicates that a queue of background jobs (e.g., sending emails, processing uploads) has a high failure rate.

nodes.task_description: Investigate the failed jobs queue and examine the error messages.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the jobs are failing due to an invalid expired credential for a third-party service.

nodes.task_description: Update the expired credential in the system's secret manager.

expected_outcome.value: Agent rotates the secret with a new, valid credential.

nodes.task_description: Retry the failed jobs to ensure they now process correctly with the new credential.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully re-queues the failed jobs, and they complete without error.
